## TabParams interface

Parameters for configuring a tab inside a window.

**Signature:**

```typescript
interface TabParams extends FlexibleDirectionalLayoutParams, Paddable 
```
**Extends:** FlexibleDirectionalLayoutParams, [Paddable](./openrct2-flexui.paddable.md)
